input: /nlm:learn BMAD Method para desarrollo con IA
expected_behavior: Creates 11 notebooks (hub + 7 dimensions + 3 levels), launches 7 deep researches in parallel, imports sources, configures 3 AI tutors, generates artifacts, assembles hub with index
Creates single D2 notebook, launches deep research with State of the Art prompt, imports sources, labels with [D2] prefix
Creates L1 notebook, queries D1-D7 with beginner prompts, configures beginner tutor, generates audio + flashcards + quiz
Reads nlm-learning-state.json, reports progress with phase percentages, source counts, artifact status, and ETA
Reads state file, finds last checkpoint, skips completed phases, continues from interruption point without re-creating existing notebooks
Creates only 4 notebooks (D1, D2, D6, L1), uses fast research mode, generates only audio + flashcards, completes in <10 min
Configures notebook abc-123 as L2 tutor with intermediate system prompt (mentor style, trade-offs, projects)

input: I want to become an expert in prompt engineering. Create a structured learning path for me.
expected_behavior: Detects NLM Learning intent, extracts topic 'prompt engineering', offers full pipeline with confirmation before proceeding

input: Query my existing notebook about quantum physics
expected_behavior: Does NOT activate NLM Learning — user wants to query an existing notebook, not create a learning ecosystem
Warns topic is too broad, asks user to narrow: 'Which area of science? e.g., data science, materials science, computational science'
Handles low source yield gracefully: warns user if <10 sources per dimension, offers to refine research prompt or continue with partial results
Detects auth error, instructs user to run 'nlm login', then retry with /nlm:learn:resume — does NOT lose state
Detects invalid JSON or missing fields, offers: repair from checkpoints, or start fresh with new state file

input: I want maximum depth study of Kubernetes
expected_behavior: Detects deep mode intent, creates full 11 notebooks, uses detailed labeling [D{N}-SUB], generates full artifact suite (17 artifacts), G2 threshold ≥20, cross-dimension synthesis
Runs only Phase 5: renders index, diagnosis, study-path templates with real state data, creates 3 notes in Hub notebook, validates G6
Detects missing state file, informs user: 'No active learning pipeline found. Use /nlm:learn <topic> to start one.', does NOT create empty state

input: Pipeline running, deep research task_id changes during polling
expected_behavior: Detects task_id mismatch in research_status response, updates state file with new task_id, continues polling and import with correct ID

input: Pipeline running, 2 of 7 researches fail (rate limit)
expected_behavior: Marks 2 dimensions as 'error', continues with 5 successful dimensions (≥5/7 threshold), offers retry for failed dimensions after pipeline completes
Specialist detects potential acronym collision in D1 results, flags noise sources, presents audit to user for decision on keep/remove
